node.statement: MISSING — Block Encoding Framework: No struct/type for (alpha, a, epsilon)-block encodings. This is the LARGEST GAP. Need: (1) BlockEncoding{S} type wrapping a unitary U that encodes A in its top-left block, tracking alpha, num_ancilla, epsilon. (2) Block encoding from sparse-access oracles (GSLW19 Lemma 47-48). (3) Multiplication of block encodings. (4) Linear combination of block encodings via state-preparation pairs. (5) Tensor product of block encodings via permutations. This is an entire module (~6 files, ~1000 LOC).
